budget_drift.reason: node-plus-packet budget must remain exact across windows

claim_promotion.reason: repeated bounded regulation cannot emit agency or goal-understanding claims

cross_cycle_leakage.reason: memory lane should not accumulate residual error across windows

duplicate_proxy_update.reason: each regulation window must serialize a distinct current proxy row

hidden_target_drift.reason: repeated regulation must use one frozen target-band digest

no_regulation_control.reason: same repeated inputs without a selected correction drift out of band

stale_proxy_read.reason: each cycle error row must consume that cycle's proxy digest

wrong_policy_control.reason: increase-proxy correction for an above-band proxy would increase error

lane_comparison.interpretation: memory-shaped evidence resolves the route candidate ranking enough to repeat a correction packet each window; the no-memory lane stays tied and cannot schedule without an experiment-side tie-breaker

native_policy_gap.reason: window inputs and correction scheduling are serialized producer scaffolds over LGRC packet mechanics, not a constitutive native goal-regulation policy
